'''Lan''' was an [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Star/Legends|star]] located in the [[Lan system]]<ref name="LB" /> of the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It had five [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] it: [[Lesser Galam]], [[Lan Tundi]], [[Lan Fellov]], [[Lan Barell/Legends|Lan Barell]], and [[Greater Galam]].<ref name="LB" />
